title: Use my data base with monday
excerpt:
Hi all 
I have one question, it’s possible to use my data base and monday?

posts.author: vasile.gheorghita (gheorghita)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all
I have one question, it’s possible to use my data base and monday?

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @vasile.gheorghita, thanks for posting!

Would you mind explaining a bit more? What information do you have in your database and what format is your database currently in? How were you looking to use your monday.com account and database together?

I’d love to learn more in case I can give you some suggestions!
